use_cases: Landing page hero section with quick-access navigation dock for SaaS applications
Application launcher interface with floating glass-morphic icon dock
Portfolio or creative showcase homepage with ambient lighting effects
Dashboard home page with centralized navigation hub
Product marketing page with interactive icon-based navigation
ai_summary: A full-screen dark hero section featuring a floating glass-morphism dock navigation bar with Lucide icons. The design uses radial gradient glows, vignette edges, and subtle noise textures to create an atmospheric backdrop. The dock appears to support hover interactions and is designed to be a central navigation hub for desktop and mobile platforms, installed from 21st.dev.
